hi darkheart nation i apologise for being so ass at starting messages bcuz 90 percent of the time the shit i write has nothing to do with the scenario of the bot but I TRIED OKAY now give me my distorted gold star 😠

i was originally gonna make this a copy of that mayor thaniyel bot where he finds u in the woods or whatever but my neuron activated the LAST MINUTE and i changed it

also hey chat i want to hear about your darkheart headcanons please feed me

(ps also add me on discord plz... i swear im chill... i obey the geneva convention sometimes)
